title: ecbolium decussatua
intro: Ecbolium decussatua, also known as the False Borage or False Borrage, is a plant species native to tropical regions of Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve digestive issues. The health benefits of Ecbolium decussatua include its use in treating gastritis, diarrhea, and other gastrointestinal problems due to its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve making teas or infusions from its leaves or roots, which can be consumed to alleviate digestive discomfort.
